name: Skitterling
desc: A small, scuttling alien with many sharp legs that typically hunts in packs.

name: Mantis
desc: An alien predator that resembles a human-sized, purple praying mantis with huge jaws.

name: Blightmoth
desc: A slow, flying alien that spits hull-eating acid. It commands swarms of skitterlings from the back.

name: Dread mantis
desc: A heavily armored mantis, scarred from numerous engagements. Its two forelimbs have evolved into wickedly sharp, scythe-like pincers.

name: Broodqueen
desc: A supreme alien commander, resembling an engorged scorpion. Her stinger is filled with deadly venom, and she seeds the battlefield with egg sacs.

name: Egg sac
desc: A pulsing alien egg sac. Something is growing inside.
